Steps:
1. Run Single Project Backup BIM360 to Azure Blob
2. Verify download from Cloudsfer UI
3. Verify report email received
4. Download CSV from email URL
5. Verify report name and all details
6. Compare old and new report
7. Verify version numbers
8. Verify URL expires in 72 hours
9. Verify file metadata
ExpectedResult: Download works. Email received. CSV accurate. Metadata matches. URL expires in 72 hours.
